title: Technical Training Centre
contentHtml:
Our objective is to-

Ø Develop TTC as Centre of excellence

Ø Training and Skill Development of serving as well as newly recruited Employees

Ø Cater the training needs of the MCF/RBL

Ø “Product based training” to all Zonal Railways & Production units as per their requirements

Ø Contribute towards industrial development of the nation through skill development
